title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Westside Capital India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Westside Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Westside Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Westside Capital India:
Westside Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Westside Capital India!
